channel.title: Simpson's Paradox on Babak Salimi's Home Page
channel.description: Recent content in Simpson's Paradox on Babak Salimi's Home Page

item.title: HypDB
item.description: HypDB is the first system to detect, explain, and resolve bias in decision-support OLAP queries. We show that biased queries can be perplexing and lead to statistical anomalies, such as Simpson’s paradox. We propose a novel technique to find explanations for the bias, thereby assisting the analyst in interpreting the results. We develop an automated method for rewriting the query into an unbiased query that correctly performs the hypothesis test that the analyst had in mind.
